rulings.Case Title: JULES RADCLIFFE et al VS. PHUONG PHAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Trinh Pham To Comply With Deposition Subpoena On A Date Certain And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFFS JULES RADCLIFFE and MICHAEL JELLISON's Motion To Compel Trinh Pham To Comply With Deposition Subpoena On A Date Certain And Request For Sanctions GRANTED. Trinh Pham shall appear for deposition no later than March12, 2015, unless otherwise stipulated by the parties or ordered by the Court. Sanctions granted in the amount requested. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ROJER ROMERO VS. HAZEL BRUNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Answer To Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANTS BALDINI REAL ESTATE INC. and BRUNO BALDINI's Motion For Leave To Amend Answer To Plaintiffs Complaint OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005 (filed February 5, 2015, set for hearing March 2, 2015); no courtesy copies. SFLR 2.6B. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: MARIO RAMOS VS. JUAN FERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANTS JUAN FERNANDEZ, MARIA FERNANDEZ, JUAN FERNANDEZ AND MARIA FERNANDEZ, AS TRUSTEES, ROWENA FERNANDEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: MARIO RAMOS VS. JUAN FERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT JUAN FERNANDEZ, MARIA FERNANDEZ, JUAN FERNANDEZ AND MARIA FERNANDEZ, AS TRUSTEES, ROWENA FERNANDEZ's Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint DENIED. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: PRISCILLA HSUE VS. HOWARD RICHMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Sanctions Against Plaintiff Priscilla Hsue For Expenses Defendants Incurred Proving Matters Plaintiff Failed To Admit
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANTS HOWARD RICHMAN and CLAUDINE TRITTIN-RICHMAN's Motion For An Award Of Sanctions Against Plaintiff Priscilla Hsue For Expenses Defendants Incurred Proving Matters Plaintiff Failed To Admit DENIED: (1) the motion is premised on the false notion that a person diagnosed with asthma or Crohn's disease is necessarily legally "disabled"; (2) counsel's declaration largely fails to attribute particular fees to the requests for admission; (3) plaintiff's denials of the requests for admission were largely reasonable.= (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA SIMON, AS CONSERVATOR OF THE PERSON VS. DEBORAH WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 10. DEFENDANTS DEBORAH WILLIAMS and BYRON THOMPSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required.= (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: GARY W PASQUINELLI AND JUDITH HONIG PASQUINELLI VS. GEOFFREY KARREN
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANT GEOFFREY KARREN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist as to (1) the area in question being a "roof" or a "balcony" and (2) as to the authorization for alterations. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BTP MISSION TIFFANY, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ARTURO ROSAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendants, Or In The Alternative, For Order Compelling Defendants And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 2, 2015 line 6. PLAINTIFF BTP MISSION TIFFANY, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendants, Or In The Alternative, For Order Compelling Defendants And Imposing Monetary Sanctions DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion for terminating sanctions is denied. Motion to compel attendance at depositions is granted subject to a 2-week trial continuance. Moving party is ordered to prepare order. Deposition is to take place on a date set by the Plaintiff within 5-10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $525. = (501/RBU)
